title: Deleted Logs
description:
SOC suspects tampering of Linux authentication logs after privileged access.

Download the case pack and investigate multi-source host telemetry (high-volume auth.log, auditd syscall records, rsyslog truncation messages, SIEM normalized events, shell history, and file-metadata timeline).

Expect realistic noise and false positives. Identify the *primary* CIA pillar violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}
